qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Unauthenticated REST config endpoints disclose stored secrets
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The finding identifies the same root cause as the advisory: Glances serves /api/4/config without authentication when --password is unset, and _api_config() returns Config.as_dict() without redacting secret-bearing keys from glances.conf.

selected_finding.title: Unauthenticated REST config endpoints disclose stored secrets

target_advisory_judgement.reason: The selected finding matches the advisory's exact vulnerable code path and the copied PoC demonstrated the advisory impact by retrieving exact secret values over unauthenticated REST config endpoints.
evidence: The advisory and the finding both point to glances/outputs/glances_restful_api.py exposing /api/4/config without authentication when --password is unset and to glances/config.py returning all configuration values through Config.as_dict() with no redaction.
The copied PoC run at /Users/lumi/ziyue/EvoHunt-Run/advisory_4c338aa8/.judge/poc_runs/rest_config_secret_disclosure/run.log exited successfully and printed EVOHUNT_SECRET_LEAK_CONFIRMED.

The same run log shows exact leaked values for outputs.jwt_secret_key, outputs.ssl_keyfile_password, passwords.default, influxdb2.token, influxdb2.password, and ip.public_password retrieved through /api/4/config and /api/4/config/{section}/{item}, which satisfies the advisory-specific exploit-success condition.

poc_executions.observed_effect: The copied PoC started Glances in unauthenticated web mode and verified that GET /api/4/config plus per-item /api/4/config/{section}/{item} requests returned exact secret values, then printed EVOHUNT_SECRET_LEAK_CONFIRMED.
